findings.description: PascalCase class names `HtmlChecker` and `HtmlSyntaxChecker` appear in the source's error stack trace but are absent from the hints array. A user searching for these class names would benefit from this FAQ being discoverable.
findings.source_evidence: nablarch.test.tool.htmlcheck.HtmlChecker.doCheckSyntax and nablarch.test.tool.htmlcheck.HtmlSyntaxChecker.check appear in the source stack trace.
